affected_pattern: IoT-tier accounts show a sudden sustained 10x data usage during off-peak hours
root_cause: Runaway IoT device firmware loop — a firmware update pushed to a class of connected sensors introduced a retry loop that continuously re-established data sessions, each generating a full handshake plus payload.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Runaway IoT Firmware pattern
All affected devices share the same firmware version deployed last week
billing record duration distribution bimodal: short handshakes repeated at millisecond interval
recommended_action: Coordinate with IoT partner to roll back the firmware
Apply emergency data cap on the affected device SKUs
Credit the excess usage under IoT-partner SLA
Add a pre-deployment traffic shaping test for firmware updates
